Differentiate between propositions and predicates.  
Determine the truth value of quantified statements given predicates and domains.  
Translate mathematical statements into logical expressions using predicates and quantifiers.  
Understand how to prove or disprove universally and existentially quantified statements.  
Use examples and counterexamples to verify the truth or falsity of quantified statements.
